title: oops on reading /proc/capi/controller after removing b1isa
description:
Latest working kernel version: unknown
Earliest failing kernel version: unknown
Distribution: debian, kernel self-built
Hardware Environment: x86 system with B1 ISA ISDN controller
Software Environment: debian unstable
Problem Description: oops on reading /proc/capi/controller after rmmod b1isa

Steps to reproduce:
- verify a B1 ISA is shown in /proc/capi/controller
- rmmod b1isa
- cat /proc/capi/controller
